slide0_text:
Forget everything you knew about complex OSs. We've made this system as simple and friendly as possible.

This short tour will show you the basic buttons of your new system.
slide1_text:
Where is the Start Menu? Just press the Windows (Super) key on your keyboard or click the menu icon on the panel.

Just start typing the name of the program you need — the system will find it instantly!
slide2_text: Equestria OS is highly customizable. Used to the taskbar at the bottom? Or want a dock in the center? You can also change the entire color scheme to match your favorite character!
slide3_text:
No more searching for installers on the web! Install top-tier software and update your entire system with one click via Essentials.

Need a specific app out of thousands? Just switch to the full App Store mode inside!
slide4_text: Installing is easy, and uninstalling is even easier. If you no longer need a program, use the Package Manager to safely remove it.
slide5_text: Running out of space on your fast SSD? Our Relocator tool allows you to move a heavy game to an HDD, leaving an invisible symlink. Launchers won't even notice the files moved!
slide6_text: For advanced users, we've created graphical toggles. No need to use the terminal to manage background services (Systemd) or create a Swap file if you run out of RAM.
slide7_text:
This system is now your home. If you forget something or want to configure autostart, check out our central hub.

Have a magical experience with Equestria OS!
